title: Iran says it targeted American base after fresh US strikes
summary_full: The hostilities come during a fragile ceasefire between the US and Iran, and protracted negotiations to end the three-month war.
summary_public: The hostilities come during a fragile ceasefire between the US and Iran, and protracted negotiations to end the three-month war.
